common.storageDegradedMessage: Persistent storage is unavailable. Pocket AI will run without saving your chats, settings, or model metadata.

errors.engineNotReady: Load a local model before continuing.
errors.engineBusy: Finish or stop the current operation before starting another one.
errors.engineUnloading: The current model is unloading. Wait a moment and try again.
errors.modelNotFound: The selected model is no longer available on this device.
errors.modelLoadFailed: The model could not be loaded. Try again or choose a different profile.
errors.modelIncompatible: This GGUF file cannot be loaded as a text model (it looks like a multimodal projector). Choose a different GGUF.
errors.modelMemoryInsufficient: Not enough memory to load this model. Choose a smaller model or close other apps.
errors.modelMemoryWarning: This model may not fit in memory with the current settings. Try loading with safer settings or choose a smaller model.
errors.downloadDiskSpaceLow: There is not enough free storage to finish this download.
errors.downloadSizeUnknown: This model does not expose a reliable file size yet. Try again later or choose another model.
errors.downloadMetadataUnavailable: This model metadata could not be resolved yet. Try again later or choose another model.
errors.downloadHttpError: The download failed because the remote server returned an error.
errors.downloadVerificationFailed: The downloaded file could not be verified. Try downloading it again.
errors.downloadFileMissing: The downloaded file could not be found on disk.

home.initializationFailedMessage: Some background setup failed. You can continue, but some features may be unavailable.
home.noConversationsDescription: Start a chat and your recent conversations will appear here.

modal.description: Additional app actions and platform-specific flows.
modal.body: This route is reserved for compact modal interactions that should inherit the shared theme, typography, and navigation chrome.

chat.title: Chat
chat.inputPlaceholderDisabled: Load a model to start chatting...
chat.warmingUpDescription: The selected local model is still preparing. You can review chat history while loading finishes.
chat.loadModelWarning: Load a model to continue chatting
chat.loadModelDescription: Chat history is still available, but sending is disabled until a local model is ready.
chat.generationStopped: Generation stopped. You can continue the thread or regenerate from any user message.
chat.summaryTrimmedTitle: Older messages are being trimmed from the model context
chat.summaryTrimmedDescription_one: {{count}} earlier message stays visible in the thread, but only recent context is sent during generation.
chat.summaryTrimmedDescription_other: {{count}} earlier messages stay visible in the thread, but only recent context is sent during generation.
chat.memoryPressureDescription: The active model may be unloaded to keep the app responsive.
chat.thermalDescriptionCritical: Device temperature is critical. Pause generation or switch to a smaller model.
chat.thermalDescriptionElevated: Device temperature is elevated. Responses may slow down until the device cools.
chat.emptyExistingThread: This conversation is empty. Type something below to restart it.
chat.emptyNewThread: Type something below to start the conversation.
chat.editEarlierMessageDescription: Update the selected prompt, then send to regenerate this branch from that point.
chat.thinkingDescription: Tap to inspect the live reasoning trace.
chat.thinkingWaiting: The model started thinking, but the trace is still empty.
chat.thoughtDescription: Tap to review the saved reasoning trace.
chat.deleteUserMessageDescription: Deleting this message will also remove all later replies in this branch.
chat.deleteAssistantMessageDescription: Deleting this reply will also remove any later messages in this branch.
chat.reloadModelWhileGenerating: Stop the current response before reloading model settings.
chat.headerPresetAccessibilityLabel: Open the preset picker for this chat

conversationSwitcher.title: Conversations
conversationSwitcher.subtitle: Switch threads without losing your current context.
conversationSwitcher.presetBlocked: Stop the current response before changing the preset.
conversationSwitcher.emptyDescription: Start chatting and your saved threads will appear here.

presetSelector.title: System Presets
presetSelector.subtitle: Choose a system prompt for the next conversation.
presetSelector.defaultDescription: Use the standard assistant behavior without a saved preset.

modelControls.title: Model controls
modelControls.descriptionForModel: Saved separately for {{modelLabel}}. Sampling changes apply immediately, while load settings use Apply & reload.
modelControls.descriptionNoModel: Load or open a model-linked chat to adjust generation controls.
modelControls.runtimeReloadDescription: Context window and GPU layers are applied the next time the model is loaded into memory.
modelControls.runtimeMismatchDescription: Requested {{requested}} tok, but the model loaded with {{loaded}} tok due to model or memory limits at load time.
modelControls.runtimeMismatchDescriptionSafe: Requested {{requested}} tok, but the model loaded with {{loaded}} tok in safe mode to avoid running out of memory.
modelControls.pendingLoadProfileDescription: Save this load profile so the next model load uses the updated context window and GPU layers.
modelControls.contextWindowDescription: Sets the token budget reserved when the model is loaded. The maximum here depends on model metadata and estimated device RAM headroom.
modelControls.gpuLayersDescription: Offloads more layers to GPU when available. Recommended for this device: {{count}}.
modelControls.liveSamplingDescription: These controls affect the next response immediately and do not require reloading the model.
modelControls.reasoningDescription: Stores a separate reasoning trace for supported models without mixing it into the visible reply.
modelControls.temperatureDescription: Higher values make replies looser and more creative.
modelControls.topPDescription: Controls how wide the token pool stays before sampling.
modelControls.topKDescription: Keeps only the K most likely next tokens before sampling.
modelControls.minPDescription: Drops tokens that are too unlikely compared with the top candidate.
modelControls.repetitionPenaltyDescription: Discourages the model from repeating the same wording too often.
modelControls.maxTokensDescription: Caps response length for this model profile. Higher values can leave less room for chat history when context is tight.

conversations.title: All Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Search, rename, open, and delete saved chats.
conversations.emptyDescription: Start a chat and it will appear here for later search, rename, and cleanup.
conversations.emptySearchDescription: Try a different title, model name, or preview keyword.
conversations.noMessagesYet: No messages in this conversation yet.

retention.title: Chat Retention
retention.description: Auto-cleanup applies to inactive chats and never removes the conversation you currently have open.
retention.days30Description: Remove inactive chats after a month.
retention.confirmMessage: Chats inactive for more than {{retention}} will be removed automatically. The currently open chat is kept.
retention.cleanupMessage_one: Removed {{count}} old conversation that exceeded the new retention window.
retention.cleanupMessage_other: Removed {{count}} old conversations that exceeded the new retention window.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Choose light, dark, or follow your device theme automatically.
settings.languageDescription: Switch app copy between English and Russian.
settings.presetsDescription: Manage your system prompt presets in one place.
settings.storageManagerDescription: Review disk, cache, chat history, and model memory in one flow.
settings.huggingFaceTokenDescription: Configure a local access token for gated or private model repositories.
settings.huggingFaceTokenScreenDescription: Save a local access token to unlock gated or private model downloads.
settings.huggingFaceTokenHelper: The token is stored locally in secure device storage and is only attached to Hugging Face requests when needed.
settings.huggingFaceTokenInputPlaceholder: Paste your Hugging Face access token
settings.huggingFaceTokenEducationBody: A Hugging Face token lets Pocket AI read gated or private model repositories that your account can access. Public models continue to work without one.
settings.huggingFaceTokenRecommendation: A read or fine-grained read token is usually enough. Pocket AI stores it only in secure local storage on this device.
settings.huggingFaceTokenGetTokenHelper: Need a token? Create one in your Hugging Face account settings, then paste it here.
settings.privacyDisclosuresDescription: See what stays on-device, when the network is used, and which controls are available.
settings.memoryDescription: Android RAM usage with app memory shown separately.
settings.memoryDescriptionFallback: App-process RAM only. Device-wide RAM is unavailable.
settings.storageDescription: Device-wide storage reported by the OS, with model files shown separately.
settings.performanceDescription: View and export recent performance traces.

performance.title: Performance
performance.subtitle: Trace and export recent timings for debugging.
performance.instrumentationToggleDescription: Record performance events and logs for this session.
performance.exportFailedMessage: Unable to export the performance trace. Please try again.
performance.shareFailedMessage: Unable to open the share sheet. You can still copy the trace.
performance.saveFailedMessage: Unable to save the trace to a file. You can still copy the trace.
performance.logcatDumpFailedMessage: Unable to write the trace to logcat. Please try again.

legal.title: Privacy & Disclosures
legal.subtitle: How Pocket AI handles local inference, storage, and network access.
legal.introTitle: Pocket AI is designed for local-first usage.
legal.introDescription: The app keeps downloaded models, chats, presets, and settings on this device, while network access is limited to model discovery and download flows.
legal.onDeviceDescription: Chat prompts and generated responses stay local to the device when you use a downloaded GGUF model. Pocket AI does not call a hosted chat-completion API in the v1 release flow.
legal.networkDescription: Network requests are used for Hugging Face catalog search, optional metadata fetches, and model file downloads. If a model is already on the device, offline chats continue to work without that catalog access.
legal.storageDescription: Downloaded models, chat history, presets, and generation settings are persisted in app-managed local storage. Storage Manager can offload models, clear chats, and reset settings.
legal.downloadsDescription: Model files can be large. Pocket AI warns about low disk space, memory-fit risk, and cellular downloads, and verifies file integrity when checksum metadata is available.
legal.resourcesDescription: The app monitors RAM, disk pressure, and thermal state to warn about risky conditions and unload the active model when the device needs relief.
legal.controlsDescription: You can change language and theme, manage presets, unload the active model, delete downloaded files, and clear persisted conversations directly from the app.

storageManager.title: Storage Manager
storageManager.subtitle: Clean up model files, cache, chats, and settings without breaking active state.
storageManager.memoryLiveDescription: Live RAM usage updates every second while this screen stays open.
storageManager.storageBreakdownDescription: Device storage plus app-managed breakdown for models, cache, chat history, and settings.
storageManager.actionsDescription: Each action refreshes the metrics after it finishes.
storageManager.clearCacheDescription: Remove temporary files and cached catalog data that the app can rebuild.
storageManager.clearCacheMessage: Clear temporary files and cached catalog data now?
storageManager.clearChatHistoryDescription: Remove persisted conversations from the app while keeping your downloaded models.
storageManager.clearChatHistoryMessage: Delete all saved chat history now?
storageManager.resetSettingsDescription: Restore app settings to defaults and unload the active model if one is loaded.
storageManager.resetSettingsMessage: Reset app settings to defaults now?
storageManager.deleteModelMessage: Delete "{{model}}" from device storage? If it is active, it will be unloaded first. You can keep its saved settings for a future download or remove them too.
storageManager.downloadedModelsDescription: Offloading removes the local file and keeps the rest of the app state consistent.
storageManager.emptyModelsDescription: Download a local model first, then you can offload it from here later.
storageManager.lowMemoryDescription: RAM usage is high. Consider unloading the active model or switching to a smaller one.
storageManager.lowDiskDescription: Free storage is getting low. Offload unused models or clear cache to avoid download failures.

presets.editorDescription: Edit the preset and make it active for the next new chat.
presets.validationErrorMessage: Name and Prompt cannot be empty

models.title: Models
models.emptyFiltered: Try clearing one or more filters to broaden the catalog.
models.emptySearchHint: Try a different search term or load more results.
models.paginationLocalSortHint: This sort is applied on-device. Newly loaded models may appear earlier in the list.
models.catalogEnd: You have reached the end of the catalog results.
models.guidedDiscoveryWithoutToken: Showing models that fit in device RAM and do not require a Hugging Face token, sorted by downloads.
models.guidedDiscoveryWithToken: Showing models that fit in device RAM first, sorted by downloads. You can switch to the full catalog at any time.
models.cellularWarningMessage: You are on a cellular network. Large downloads may incur costs. Proceed?
models.unknownSizeWarningMessage: This model does not expose a reliable file size yet. Storage estimates and size-based verification will be limited. Continue anyway?
models.downloadMemoryWarningMessage: This model looks large for your device's RAM budget. It may download successfully but still fail to load. Download anyway?
models.loadMemoryWarningMessage: This model looks close to or above your device's RAM budget. Loading may fail. Try anyway?
models.loadMemoryBlockedMessage: This model is marked as "Won't fit RAM" and loading is disabled to prevent crashes. Choose a smaller model.

errorReport.title: Model load report
errorReport.subtitle: Copy or share diagnostics to help debug model loading failures.
errorReport.privacyMessage: The report is generated on-device. Toggle what to include before copying or sharing.
errorReport.includeModelMessage: Model id, file size, and RAM-fit metadata.
errorReport.includeEngineMessage: Current load/unload state and active model id.
errorReport.includeOptionsMessage: Flags used when loading this model.
errorReport.includeDeviceMessage: Device model, OS version, RAM, and CPU architecture.
errorReport.includeDiagnosticsMessage: Memory-fit estimate, snapshots, and native init diagnostics (if available).
errorReport.includeStackMessage: JS stack trace for the error (if available).
errorReport.additionalInfoMessage: Add steps to reproduce or any extra notes.
errorReport.additionalInfoPlaceholder: Example: tapped Load Anyway after a memory warning, then it failed…
errorReport.copiedMessage: The report was copied to your clipboard.
errorReport.copyFailedMessage: Could not copy the report. Please try again.
errorReport.shareFailedMessage: Could not open the share sheet. You can still copy the report.

models.deleteMessage: Delete this model from your device? Choose whether to keep its saved settings for a future download.
models.descriptionUnavailable: This model card does not expose a short description yet. Open the Hugging Face page for the full README.
models.tagsUnavailable: No tags were returned for this model.
models.detailMissingModel: The selected model could not be resolved from the current catalog state.
